owning_subsystem: governed quantitative decision substrate across enterprise, schemas, shared, services, workflows, and agents
non_goals: Do not move decision logic into ui/ or infrastructure/.
Do not add remote inference, online training, or opaque autonomous mutation paths.
Do not bypass schemas/ contracts or workflow policy gates.
scope_in: Add versioned decision contracts and SurrealDB representability.
Add shared deterministic decision primitives, probabilistic baselines, game analysis, and policy-gated composition.
Expose read-only evaluation through governance-service, decision_evaluation workflow, and strategist agent inputs.
Add architecture and ADR documentation plus fixture-backed integration coverage.
scope_out: Durable persistence for decision artifacts beyond representability.
Production model serving, remote inference, or training pipelines.
acceptance_criteria: Decision evaluation returns structured recommendation, policy-gate verdict, and audit record artifacts.
Probabilistic and game-theoretic baselines are deterministic under an explicit evaluation seed.
Policy gates remain authoritative for executable outcomes and learned adapters stay advisory-only when unconfigured.
Cross-plane tests cover rollout selection, policy rejection, ranked audit output, and unconfigured learned-adapter behavior.
validation_artifacts: Passing contract, shared, service, and workflow tests for decisioning
Fixture-backed recommendation and audit outputs under testing/fixtures/decisioning/run-2026-03-10/
Committed ADR, architecture document, and execution plan bundle
rollback_path: Revert the cross-layer decisioning contracts, shared engine, governance-service/workflow integration, agent alignment, fixture updates, and supporting docs together so the repository returns to the previous governed workflow baseline.
